message:
fix(config): improve SSH key path validation with comprehensive checks

Enhance SSH key validation to catch more error cases early with clear
error messages, reducing debugging time when keys are misconfigured.

New validation checks:
- Directory instead of file: Clear error for accidentally pointing to ~/.ssh/
- Symlink resolution: Verify symlinks point to valid files
- Non-regular files: Catch sockets, devices, or other special files
- Broken symlinks: Detect and report unresolvable symlinks

Design decisions documented:
- No permission checks (TOCTOU issues, SSH gives clear errors)
- No symlink target restrictions (users may have valid cross-location links)

Also includes SSH module improvements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
